<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>The Real Jordan Belfort</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&display=swap');

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    background: #f0f0f0;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .scene {
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: relative;
  }

  /* CURSOR */
  .cursor {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    background: #222;
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: fixed;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9999;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  }

  /* SEARCH BAR */
  .search-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(20px);
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.3s forwards;
  }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .search-bar {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 50px;
    padding: 14px 14px 14px 28px;
    width: 520px;
    box-shadow:
      8px 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12),
      -4px -4px 12px rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    position: relative;
  }

  .search-input {
    flex: 1;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: #333;
    background: transparent;
    caret-color: #333;
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .search-input::placeholder {
    color: #bbb;
  }

  .search-btn {
    width: 50px;
    height: 50px;
    background: #222;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease;
  }

  .search-btn:hover {
    background: #444;
    transform: scale(1.05);
  }

  .search-btn svg {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    fill: white;
  }

  /* RESULTS */
  .results {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: #111;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 100;
    transition: opacity 0.6s ease;
  }

  .results.visible {
    opacity: 1;
    pointer-events: all;
  }

  .results-title {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: #666;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .results-title span {
    color: #c8a96e;
  }

  .photos-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 180px);
    grid-template-rows: repeat(2, 160px);
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .photo-card {
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.85) translateY(20px);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    background: #1a1a1a;
  }

  .photo-card:hover {
    transform: scale(1.04) translateY(0px);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .photo-card img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    filter: grayscale(20%);
    transition: filter 0.3s ease;
  }

  .photo-card:hover img {
    filter: grayscale(0%);
  }

  .photo-card .label {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.85));
    color: white;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 16px 10px 8px;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
  }

  .photo-card:hover .label {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .photo-card.show {
    animation: cardIn 0.5s ease forwards;
  }

  @keyframes cardIn {
    to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
  }

  .close-btn {
    margin-top: 36px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: #444;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.2s ease;
  }

  .close-btn:hover { color: #c8a96e; }

  /* TYPING LABEL */
  .typing-label {
    position: absolute;
    top: -36px;
    left: 28px;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #aaa;
    opacity: 0;
  }

  .typing-label.show {
    animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease forwards;
  }

  @keyframes fadeIn {
    to { opacity: 1; }
  }

  /* MOUSE TRAIL */
  .trail {
    position: fixed;
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 9998;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>

<div class="scene">
  <div class="search-wrapper">
    <div class="typing-label" id="typingLabel">searching...</div>
    <div class="search-bar">
      <input class="search-input" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search..." readonly />
      <div class="search-btn" id="searchBtn">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 21l-4.35-4.35M17 11A6 6 0 1 1 5 11a6 6 0 0 1 12 0z" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/></svg>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RESULTS OVERLAY -->
<div class="results" id="results">
  <div class="results-title">Results for: <span>"The Real Jordan Belfort"</span></div>
  <div class="photos-grid" id="photosGrid">
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="1987 — Wall Street Beginnings">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
           onerror="this.src='https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSYQPy2M0WatVrJQlvqQEMMuR_XDDWMo3cW2Q&s'; this.parentElement.style.background='#1a1a1a'"
           alt="Jordan Belfort" />
      <div class="label">1987 — Wall Street</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="Stratton Oakmont CEO">
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSUtVjX0CR-BJgtlESbWQzk3MYEfsfd0g2Hug&s"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="Jordan Belfort CEO" />
      <div class="label">Stratton Oakmont CEO</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="The Arrest — 1998">
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcQzrio8XuEql6N8M-0h1pxMkVETBFEQncv2vQ&s"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="Jordan Belfort arrest" />
      <div class="label">The Arrest — 1998</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="After Prison — Motivational Speaker">
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSOZe1SQRNO6qMND6udvgCwrF9J3FfFPCKd5w&s"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="Jordan Belfort today" />
      <div class="label">After Prison</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="Stratton Oakmont Office">
      <img src="https://i.insider.com/52969afb6bb3f74b4d00001b?width=700"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="Stratton Oakmont" />
      <div class="label">Stratton Oakmont</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="The Real Wolf">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="Jordan Belfort real" />
      <div class="label">The Real Wolf</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="FBI Investigation">
      <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSSV4pj1laRz64GVOlgTnoIHTX7dS3sqFiuBg&s"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="FBI" />
      <div class="label">FBI Investigation</div>
    </div>
    <div class="photo-card" data-label="Today — The Aftermath">
      <img src="https://i.pinimg.com/736x/d0/d6/9c/d0d69c46fd2e21dc6b57417a18448e8b.jpg"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'"
           alt="Today" />
      <div class="label">Today</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="close-btn" id="closeBtn">[ click to go back ]</div>
</div>

<script>
  // Custom cursor
  const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
  let mouseX = window.innerWidth / 2;
  let mouseY = window.innerHeight / 2;

  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    mouseX = e.clientX;
    mouseY = e.clientY;
    cursor.style.left = mouseX + 'px';
    cursor.style.top = mouseY + 'px';
  });

  // Auto-typing animation
  const input = document.getElementById('searchInput');
  const typingLabel = document.getElementById('typingLabel');
  const searchBtn = document.getElementById('searchBtn');
  const results = document.getElementById('results');
  const photosGrid = document.getElementById('photosGrid');
  const closeBtn = document.getElementById('closeBtn');

  const text = "the real jordan belfort";
  let i = 0;
  let started = false;

  // Move cursor to search bar area then start typing
  function startSequence() {
    if (started) return;
    started = true;

    // Show typing label
    setTimeout(() => {
      typingLabel.classList.add('show');
    }, 600);

    // Start typing
    setTimeout(() => {
      typeChar();
    }, 1000);
  }

  function typeChar() {
    if (i < text.length) {
      input.value += text[i];
      i++;
      setTimeout(typeChar, 80 + Math.random() * 60);
    } else {
      // Done typing — click the search button
      setTimeout(() => {
        searchBtn.style.transform = 'scale(0.92)';
        setTimeout(() => {
          searchBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
          showResults();
        }, 150);
      }, 600);
    }
  }

  function showResults() {
    results.classList.add('visible');
    const cards = photosGrid.querySelectorAll('.photo-card');
    cards.forEach((card, idx) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        card.classList.add('show');
      }, idx * 100);
    });
  }

  closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    results.classList.remove('visible');
    setTimeout(() => {
      input.value = '';
      i = 0;
      started = false;
      typingLabel.classList.remove('show');
      photosGrid.querySelectorAll('.photo-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('show'));
      setTimeout(startSequence, 1500);
    }, 600);
  });

  // Start after page loads
  setTimeout(startSequence, 1200);
</script>
</body>
</html>
